# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_flavors (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances flavors of the tenant, optionally filtered by instance family.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_family" "family" {
  name = "Development"
}

# Retrieve the flavors of an instance family.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_flavors" "dev" {
  instance_family_id = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_family.family.id
}

output "dev_sizings" {
  value = [
    for f in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_flavors.dev.flavors :
    "${f.name}: ${f.vcpu} vCPU / ${f.ram_gb} GB"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `instance_family_id` (String) Filter flavors by instance family ID.

### Read-Only

- `flavors` (List of Object) The list of flavors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--flavors))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--flavors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `flavors`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `instance_family_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `ram_gb` (Number)
- `vcpu` (Number)
